title: angelonia eriostachys
intro: Angelonia eriostachys, also known as the Angel's Trumpet, is a plant species belonging to the bignonia family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which contain alkaloids and flavonoids that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Angelonia eriostachys include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Angelonia eriostachys can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
